text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm a real festival lover, and I'm here to, uh...
Um...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, relax! Your smile's way too stiff! ☆ There's
nothing more important to an Umadol than her
charming smile! ☆ Got it? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The path to becoming an Umadol is by no means
an easy one. But the reason we're even in this
situation is because of what happened a few
hours ago...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So even though you've already set the date for
your concert, you don't have enough people to
perform in it?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Suzuka, Ines, and everyone else said they
already have other plans that day!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But then you came along, Kita! ♪ You appeared
before me like a sparkly flash of light! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So what do you think? Wanna try being an
Umadol?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
E-erm, well, I don't really know anything about
being an Umadol...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But I'm more than happy to help you out!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... This is a lot more involved than I thought
it would be when I offered to help earlier without
thinking.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's hard trying to introduce yourself in a cute
way! It's just so embarrassing!
choice_data_list: Being an Umadol is no walk in the park, huh?
Being an Umadol is no walk in the park, huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, but you've got heaps of potential, Kita! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're cheerful, active, handsome, and cute. ☆
Plus, our personalities complement each other,
which is awesome!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't feel discouraged, and let's keep
practicing! ♪ Once we've nailed down your intro,
we can move on to how to interact with the crowd
and practice your autograph! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Eep! I-I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kitasan Black trains hard every day to
become an Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Umadol Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for waiting, everyone! ♪ It's me, Smart
Falcon! I hope I make your hearts race today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umadol Fans
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Falcooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the cheers are deafening! All right, it's my
turn...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm Kitasan Black! A real lover of festivals, and I'm
here to set off fireworks in your heart!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Kita, you're sooo cute! Please look this
way!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What are you doing here, Dia?! And
Trainer too?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for cheering for me, but you don't have to
force yourself to call me cute or anythi—

text_block_list.name: Umadol Fans
text_block_list.text: How cuuute!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Why's everyone saying that?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Because they think it's adorable how flustered
you get from being complimented! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: O-oh man, how should I respond to them?
choice_data_list:
Remember what the most important part of
being an Umadol is!

Remember what the most important part of
being an Umadol is!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: O-oh man, how should I respond to them?
choice_data_list:
Remember what the most important part of
being an Umadol is!

Remember what the most important part of
being an Umadol is!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! My charming smile! ☆ Teehee!

text_block_list.name: Umadol Fans
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe, see? Isn't she adorable?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've known how cute you were since long
ago, Kita! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Dia, everyone—thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Umadol Fans
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I knew I was right ☆ You've got real Umadol
potential, Kita! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the concert's huge success, Smart
Falcon keeps enthusiastically soliciting Kitasan
Black to become an Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay!

text_block_list.name: Umadol Fans
text_block_list.text: We want some too! Look this way, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Um, how's this?

text_block_list.name: Umadol Fans
text_block_list.text: Kyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Male Umadol Fan
text_block_list.text: Kitasan Black... She's so cute... I'm a fan for sure!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Keep it up, Kita! Your special training is paying
off! ☆ All right, let's get started with our first
song! ☆

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Listen closely, everyone! Today, we'll be
singing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps due to how moved everyone was by
Kitasan Black's hard work onstage, a huge line
forms for the handshake event after the concert.
